auth.signInSubtitle: Use email/password or Google SSO to access your expense tracker.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Start tracking receipts, expenses, and AI-processed tickets.
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

home.title: What would you like to do?
home.newTransactionDesc: Record any expense or income manually — add multiple items, assign categories, pick a currency, and link to any of your groups. Autocomplete fills in products you've entered before.
home.newTransactionHint: Full form with item breakdown, product autocomplete, and group selection at

uploadPanel.title: Upload Receipt
uploadPanel.dropZoneLabel: Drop image here or click to browse
uploadPanel.dropZoneSub: HEIC, JPEG, PNG, WebP · max 10 MB
uploadPanel.noGroupAlert: Create a group on the Groups page before uploading receipts.
uploadPanel.selectFileFirst: Choose an image and group first.

upload.title: Upload a receipt image
upload.subtitle: Store the image in Supabase storage and queue it for AI review.
upload.formatNote: All image formats supported (HEIC, JPEG, PNG, WebP, etc.) — automatically converted to JPEG for compatibility (max 10MB).
upload.noGroupAlert: Create a group on the Groups page before uploading receipts.
upload.selectFileFirst: Choose an image and group first.
upload.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size: 10MB.

transactions.title: All tracked transactions
transactions.subtitle: Browse the expenses and income entries created in your groups.
transactions.deleteBody: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and all its items. This cannot be undone.

review.title: AI-reviewed transactions
review.subtitle: Tap an item to edit it, then approve the transaction once everything looks right.
review.empty: No transactions need review right now.
review.deleteConfirm: Delete this failed receipt? This cannot be undone.
review.approveFailed: Failed to approve transaction. Please try again.
review.approvePermissionError: Could not approve — the transaction was not updated. Check that you have permission.

recurring.title: Recurring Expenses
recurring.subtitle: Manage subscriptions, installments and fixed expenses.
recurring.name: Name
recurring.confirmCancelDesc: Transactions already generated will not be deleted.
recurring.noExpensesYetDesc: Add subscriptions, installments and periodic expenses to track them automatically.
recurring.confirmCancelText: No new transactions will be generated. Existing ones remain in your expense history.
recurring.addSubtitle: Subscriptions, installment plans, or fixed periodic expenses
recurring.periodicBillInfo: This amount will be used as a reference. You can adjust each transaction if the value varies.
recurring.retroCoveredByPaid: The {{count}} retroactive installments are covered by already-paid installments. No retroactive transactions will be generated.
recurring.retroWithPaid: {{effective}} retroactive transactions will be generated on save ({{paid}} already-paid installments will be skipped).
recurring.retroNoteSimple: {{count}} retroactive transactions will be generated on save.
recurring.confirmSkipInstallments: Installments 1–{{paid}} will not be recorded. Generation will begin from installment {{next}}.
recurring.confirmRetroCreation: {{count}} retroactive transactions will be created from {{date}}.
recurring.confirmNoRetroactive: No retroactive transactions will be generated (covered by already-paid installments).
recurring.cancelBodySubscription: No new transactions will be generated. Existing ones remain in the record normally.
recurring.cancelBodyInstallment: Remaining installments will not be generated. Already-recorded transactions remain in the history.
recurring.cancelBodyPeriodicBill: No new transactions will be generated. Existing ones remain in the record normally.
recurring.inactiveWarning: This recurring expense is canceled or completed. Past transactions are preserved in the record.
recurring.deleteQuestion: What do you want to delete?
recurring.templateOnlyDesc: Already recorded transactions are preserved as normal expenses.
recurring.deleteAllDesc: Deletes the template AND all transactions generated by this recurring expense.
recurring.confirmInstallmentSkip: Current installment will advance from {{from}} to {{to}}. Installments {{rangeStart}}–{{rangeEnd}} will not be recorded.
recurring.confirmInstallmentBack: Current installment will go back from {{from}} to {{to}}. Transactions for installments {{rangeStart}}–{{rangeEnd}} will be deleted.
recurring.confirmChangesApplyNext: Other changes will apply to the next generated transactions.
recurring.confirmChangesOnlyNext: Changes will apply to the next generated transactions.
recurring.confirmChangesNoModify: Already created transactions will not be modified.

shopping.title: Monthly Shopping List
shopping.subtitle: Based on your purchase history from the last month.
shopping.empty: No shopping data from the last month.
shopping.emptyHint: Record transactions with items to generate your list.
shopping.coldStartAll: Showing all your products — the list will refine automatically as more months accumulate.
shopping.coldStartLimited: {{count}}-month history — frequency filter adjusts to your available data.
shopping.noHabitual: No regular products match the current filters
shopping.allBought: You already bought all your regular products this month

groups.title: Manage groups
groups.subtitle: Create groups to share expenses with others.
groups.noGroups: You have no groups yet. Create one above.
groups.selectGroup: Select a group to invite members
groups.manageFamilyDesc: Create a group for family or company expense tracking and manage access together.

profile.title: Profile settings
profile.manageDesc: Manage your account and review the tracking status of your uploads.

audit.productAuditDesc: Map raw receipt text to your canonical product catalog for statistical consistency.
audit.vendorAuditDesc: Map raw receipt vendor names to your canonical vendor catalog for accurate Pareto analysis.
audit.potentialMatchesDesc: Fuzzy score 60–90% — confirm or reclassify as new.
audit.vendorPotentialDesc: Fuzzy score 60–90% or token overlap — confirm or reclassify as new.
audit.vendorNotFound: Suggested vendor not found in catalog
audit.onlyAdminsAdd: Only group admins can add products.
audit.onlyAdminsAddVendor: Only group admins can add vendors.
audit.newCandidatesDesc: No match found — type a canonical name or select an existing product.
audit.newVendorDesc: No match found — type a canonical name or select an existing vendor.
audit.allMappedDesc: Click Scan Unmapped Items to check for new receipts that need normalization.
audit.allVendorsMappedDesc: Click Scan Unmapped Vendors to check for new receipts.
audit.confirmedMappingsDesc: Raw names permanently linked to canonical products. Future scans skip the review queue for these.
audit.vendorConfirmedMappingsDesc: Raw vendor names permanently linked to canonical vendors. Future scans skip the review queue for these.
audit.noProductsYet: No products yet — add your first from the queue.
audit.deleteProductConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Affected items will need to be re-mapped.
audit.removeMappingConfirm:
Remove mapping "{{raw}}" → "{{product}}"?
Items with this raw name will re-appear in the audit queue on next scan.
audit.deleteVendorConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Affected transactions will need to be re-mapped.
audit.removeMappingVendorConfirm:
Remove mapping "{{raw}}" → "{{vendor}}"?
Transactions with this raw name will re-appear in the audit queue on next scan.
audit.noVendorsYet: No vendors yet — add your first from the queue.
audit.vendorDeleted: Vendor deleted. Affected transactions will re-appear on next scan.
audit.vendorMappingRemoved: Mapping removed. Transactions with this raw name will re-appear on next scan.

processedImages.title: Pending and processed receipts
processedImages.subtitle: Review uploads and manually trigger AI processing if needed.
processedImages.processRequestSent: Process request sent. Refresh after the function completes.

analytics.title: Statistical Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Insights from {{count}} reviewed transaction(s) across {{categories}} categor(ies).
analytics.noData: No reviewed expenses found. Approve transactions in the Review Queue first.
analytics.expensesOverTimeDesc: Daily spend per item category. Toggle categories to compare.
analytics.needMoreDates: Need at least 2 dates with data to show a trend.
analytics.dailyTotalMADesc: 7-day and 30-day moving averages smooth day-to-day noise.
analytics.needTwoTransactions: Need at least 2 transactions with dates.
analytics.priceHistoryDesc: Track how the unit price of a specific product evolved over time.
analytics.onlyOnePurchase: Only one purchase found for this product — need more data to show price trends.
analytics.anomalyDetectionDesc: Items priced more than 2 standard deviations from their category mean — potential pricing errors or unusual spending spikes.
analytics.noAnomalies: No anomalies detected — all items are within normal ranges.
analytics.paretoDesc: Identify the vendors responsible for the majority of your total spend.
analytics.groupsDesc: Contribution ratio per group member based on reviewed expenses.
analytics.exportDesc: Download reviewed expense data as flat CSV or structured JSON, optimized for external statistical tools.
analytics.csvDesc: transaction_id, date, vendor, category, item_name, quantity, unit_price, item_total, currency — one row per item.
analytics.jsonDesc: Nested structure with transaction header and items array, ready for R, Python, or any statistical environment.

landing.headline: Take control of your finances
landing.sub: Scan receipts, track spending, and get insights — all in one place. Works for individuals and groups.
landing.bottomCtaSub: Create your free account and start tracking expenses in minutes.

receiptScan.title: AI receipt scanning
receiptScan.desc: Upload a photo — Gemini 2.5 Flash extracts store, date, items, and totals automatically.

analytics.title: 7-tab analytics
analytics.desc: Overview, Trends, Products, Anomalies, Pareto, Groups, and CSV/JSON export.

groups.title: Group spending
groups.desc: Share expenses with family or housemates. See each member's contribution at a glance.

recurring.title: Recurring expenses
recurring.desc: Track subscriptions, installment plans, and periodic bills. Auto-generated on due dates.

shoppingList.title: Smart shopping list
shoppingList.desc: Monthly list derived from your purchase history — never forget what you usually buy.

normalization.title: Vendor & product audit
normalization.desc: Fuzzy-matching pipeline keeps your data clean. Review and confirm mappings once, never again.

pricing.headline: Free while in beta
pricing.sub: All features are available at no cost during the beta period.

free.name: Free beta
free.desc: Full access during the beta period. No credit card required.
